packageRules.description: Low-risk: batch every patch (plus pins/digests) into one PR and auto-merge once CI is green.
Dev-only minor bumps are low-risk — batch and auto-merge once CI is green.
@types/* are type-only definitions — group them and auto-merge non-major.
React runtime + its type defs must move in lockstep.
Clerk client + backend share a release train.
Drizzle ORM + kit are versioned together.
Automerge CRDT packages move as one across the workspace.
Cloudflare runtime tooling (wrangler + workers-types) tracks the same platform version.
Fontsource families are independent low-risk assets — batch them.
Tailwind core + its Vite plugin release together.

Vitest + its coverage provider + the workers pool must stay on one major line (vitest 4 breaks pool-workers). Group non-patch bumps into one reviewed PR — no auto-merge, since this pairing has broken before.

The deliberately-paired Vite toolchain: vite 6 + plugin-react 4 + vite-plugin-pwa 1 (plugin-react 6 / vite 8 have broken the build before). Group non-patch bumps into one reviewed PR — no auto-merge; patches still flow via the patch group.
